pull_request.title: fix: improve fcc tests branch filtering pattern
pull_request.body:
The FCC file has these branches/subbranches:
```
 'PARAMETERS',
 'PARAMETERS/_intMap',
 'PARAMETERS/_intMap/_intMap.first',
 'PARAMETERS/_intMap/_intMap.second',
 'PARAMETERS/_floatMap',
 'PARAMETERS/_floatMap/_floatMap.first',
 'PARAMETERS/_floatMap/_floatMap.second',
 'PARAMETERS/_stringMap',
 'PARAMETERS/_stringMap/_stringMap.first',
 'PARAMETERS/_stringMap/_stringMap.second'
 ```
When we do `tree.iteritems()` to extract the base form, subbranch names only contain the subbranch part and not the full path. The function sees PARAMETERS first. Then it sees _intMap, then it sees _intMap.first and so on. Therefore, the filtering function `lambda x: "PARAMETERS" not in x` is not enough. I'm updating it to a regex to exclude `_*Map*` patterns too.

changed_files.patch:
@@ -684,8 +684,8 @@ class FCC:
     Notes
     -----
     FCCSchema: This schema has been made keeping the Spring2021 pre-generated samples (pre-edm4hep1).
-    It's also tested with Winter2023 samples with the ``uproot_options={"filter_name": lambda x : "PARAMETERS" not in x}``
-    parameter when loading the fileset. This removes the "PARAMETERS" branch that is unreadable in uproot.
+    It's also tested with Winter2023 samples with the ``uproot_options={"filter_name": "/^(?!.*(PARAMETERS|_.*Map))/"}``
+    parameter when loading the fileset. This removes the "PARAMETERS" branch and all its subbranches which are unreadable by uproot.
     More Schema variants could be added later.
 
     FCCSchema_edm4hep1: This schema supports FCC samples produced with edm4hep version >= 1. It inherits

commit_summaries.message: improve fcc tests branch filtering pattern
